task: Fix DBSCAN clustering timeout in pattern extraction

steps.action: Read test output for quality_gate_pattern_accuracy failure
steps.observation: Test timed out after 60s during DBSCAN clustering with 500 episodes

steps.action: Search for DBSCAN budget or timeout in memory-core/src/patterns
steps.observation: Found ClusterBudget in dbscan/mod.rs with 10s default
O(n^2) distance matrix computation, no early termination

steps.action: Find where ClusterBudget is used in pattern extraction pipeline
steps.observation: Budget checked per-iteration but not enforced on total distance computation

steps.action: Add budget check before distance matrix in dbscan clustering
steps.observation: Early return with partial results when budget exceeded
All DBSCAN tests pass, scalability test completes in 3.2s
Full suite passes, quality gate no longer times out
